Interface IVerticalCoordinateSystem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to properties of a vertical coordinate system.

[Guid("3F6C2145-3320-446F-82BF-B3E38FADC833")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVerticalCoordinateSystem : ISpatialReferenceInfo

string

string Alias { get; }

Property Value

string

CoordinateUnit

The linear unit of a vertical coordinate system.

ILinearUnit CoordinateUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

ILinearUnit

The datum of a vertical coordinate system.

IHVDatum

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>The <STRONG>IClone::IsIdentical</STRONG> method is not implemented. </P>

FactoryCode 

int FactoryCode { get; }

Property Value

int

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

PositiveDirection

The positive direction of the z coordinates. Up is 1. Down (in the direction of gravity) is -1.

int PositiveDirection { get; set; }

Property Value

int

string
